evaluation.generated_sql: SELECT r.name AS race_name, c.name AS circuit_name, con.name AS constructor_name FROM formula_1_races r JOIN formula_1_circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid JOIN formula_1_results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid JOIN formula_1_constructors con ON res.constructorid = con.constructorid WHERE LOWER(c.country) = LOWER('Spain')
